[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00100000 1
5 00100000 1
6 10110000 3
7 00111010 4

01 01000101 3
12 00001000 1
23 00000100 1
34 10000000 1

67 00100000 1 match 4 5
70 00011010 3
